blockingIssues.description: Peer policy rows use a fixed masked placeholder ("*************") for pubkeys instead of truncated per-peer pubkey values expected by the feature contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten VAL-DASH-006 to explicitly require peer rows to show truncated pubkeys, not just badge rows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature expectedBehavior for dashboard-policies requires truncated pubkeys, but VAL-DASH-006 only checks for peer rows and permission badges; this allowed placeholder pubkeys to pass until scrutiny.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit icon-source convention (e.g., prefer lucide-react unless a design-exact custom glyph is required and justified).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Architecture guidance states lucide-react usage, but AGENTS.md omits this rule; dashboard-modals implemented an inline SVG warning icon.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify or enforce the tests-first procedure so reported compliance aligns with observed execution order.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ui-builder skill requires tests-first, but dashboard-modals transcript shows implementation edits before creating tests while handoff marked followedProcedure=true.

rejectedObservations.observation: Undocumented nuance that using Distribute screen Copy actions may leave Finish Distribution disabled while QR flow enables progression.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous and environment-dependent behavior from a single transcript; needs broader confirmation before adding shared guidance.
